description: Plugin-distributed hooks for optometry-eyecare-practice. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 3 eye-care operations/billing smells on .md/.txt (refraction note with no medical-vs-vision route, recall plan with no interval, payor reference with no date/verify-at-use). Set EYECARE_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
